com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXMulticore

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConnectivityObject, IXLibrariedObject, IXModuledObject, IXObject, IXWriteableObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXOverbraid

    public interface IXMulticore
extends IXModuledObject, IXLibrariedObject
    Interface for accessing the shield, conductors, contained multicores, harness and harness levels of a multicore.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXAbstractConductor> getConductors()
      Get the conductors associated with this multicore.
      IXHarness getHarness()
      Get the harness to which this multicore belongs.
      java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
      Get the harness levels on which this multicore is included.
      java.util.Set<IXMulticore> getMulticores()
      Get the multicores owned by this multicore.
      IXMulticore getParentMulticore()
      Get the parent multicore that contains this multicore.
      IXShield getShield()
      Get the shield conductor of this multicore.
      boolean isOverbraid()
      Flag to indicate whether this multicore is an overbraid.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXModuledObject

        getFunctionalModuleCodes, getGeneratedFunctionalModuleCodes, getGeneratedFunctionalModuleCodesExpression, getGeneratedProductionModuleCodes, getGeneratedProductionModuleCodesExpression, getModuleCodeSetter, getProductionModuleCodes, getUserFunctionalModuleCodes, getUserFunctionalModuleCodesExpression, getUserProductionModuleCodes, getUserProductionModuleCodesExpression

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXWriteableObject

        getAttributeSetter

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXConnectivityObject

        getAssembly, getDesign, getInstances, getInstances

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXLibrariedObject

        getLibraryObject

    • Method Detail

      • getShield

        IXShield getShield()
        Get the shield conductor of this multicore.
        Returns:
        the shield conductor of the multicore if one exists, null otherwise.

      • getConductors

        java.util.Set<IXAbstractConductor> getConductors()
        Get the conductors associated with this multicore. Note that this will not return conductors contained within nested multicores, but only the conductors at the top level of the hierarchy. Note that the shield conductor will not be returned by this method.
        Returns:
        a set of conductors contained within this multicore if any exist, null otherwise.

      • getMulticores

        java.util.Set<IXMulticore> getMulticores()
        Get the multicores owned by this multicore. Note that this method will only return multicores at the top level of the multicore hierarchy.
        Returns:
        a set of the top-level multicores contained within this multicore if any exist, an empty set otherwise.

      • getHarness

        IXHarness getHarness()
        Get the harness to which this multicore belongs.
        Returns:
        the harness to which this multicore belongs if one exists, null otherwise.

      • isOverbraid

        boolean isOverbraid()
        Flag to indicate whether this multicore is an overbraid.
        Returns:
        boolean True if this multicore is an overbraid.

      • getHarnessLevels

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
        Get the harness levels on which this multicore is included.
        Returns:
        a set of harness levels on which this multicore exists if any, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getParentMulticore

        IXMulticore getParentMulticore()
        Get the parent multicore that contains this multicore.
        Returns:
        multicore parent of this multicore if present. Null otherwise.
